ham.subject: Scheduled IT System Maintenance – March 10, 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Please note that the company’s internal servers and the HR portal will undergo routine maintenance on March 10, 2026 from 1:00 AM to 4:30 AM CDT. During this window, you may experience brief service interruptions.

What to expect:
- All employee email services and Microsoft Teams will be temporarily unavailable.
- The payroll system will be offline from 2:00 AM to 3:30 AM.
- All backup and snapshot processes will run as scheduled.

Recommendations:
- Save and close any open documents before 12:30 AM.
- If you are currently in the office, we advise you to avoid accessing the CRM during maintenance.
- Should you encounter any unusual activities or services remaining offline post-maintenance, report immediately to the IT Helpdesk (helpdesk@company.com).

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Suspended Corporate Credit Card – Verify Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Our security audit detected multiple suspicious transactions on your company corporate credit card ending in 9823. As a result, access to the card has been automatically suspended to protect your interests.

Immediate actions required:
1. Click the link below to confirm your identity and restart card services: <URL>
2. Complete a quick 2‑minute verification questionnaire to verify payment authorization.

Failure to comply within the next 6 hours will permanently block the card and delay your reimbursements. This measure is mandatory under new compliance regulations.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact the Finance compliance desk right away.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Corporate Security Team
